From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

The list below shows the leading [Thoroughbred](/wiki/Thoroughbred "Thoroughbred") [sire](/wiki/Father "Father") of [racehorses](/wiki/Horse_racing "Horse racing") in [Japan](/wiki/Japan "Japan") for each year since 1924. This is determined by the amount of prize money won by the sire's progeny during the season.[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*] The current leading sire in Japan is [Kizuna](/wiki/Kizuna_(horse) "Kizuna (horse)").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Records

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Leading_sire_in_Japan&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Records")]

**Most leadings:**

* 13 - [Sunday Silence](/wiki/Sunday_Silence "Sunday Silence") - *1995-2007*
* 11 - [Deep Impact](/wiki/Deep_Impact_(horse) "Deep Impact (horse)") - *2012-2022*
* 10 - [Northern Taste](/wiki/Northern_Taste "Northern Taste") - *1982, 1983, 1985-1992*
* 7 - [Hindostan](/w/index.php?title=Hindostan_(horse)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Hindostan (horse) (page does not exist)") - *1961-1965, 1967, 1968*
* 6 - Ebor - *1924-1929*; Kumohata - *1952-1957*; Tesco Boy - *1974, 1975, 1978-1981*
* 5 - Tournesol - *1935-1939*; Theft - *1947-1951*

## Top sire line

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Leading_sire_in_Japan&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Top sire line")]

The following sire-lines have produced champion sires (1924–2023).

* [Darley Arabian](/wiki/Darley_Arabian "Darley Arabian") - 24 stallion, 89 leadings. All titles since 1985.
* [Byerley Turk](/wiki/Byerley_Turk "Byerley Turk") – 2 stallions, 8 championships, most recently [Partholon](/w/index.php?title=Partholon_(horse)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Partholon (horse) (page does not exist)") in 1984.
* [Godolphin Arabian](/wiki/Godolphin_Arabian "Godolphin Arabian") – 1 stallion, 1 championship, most recently [Chapel Brampton](/w/index.php?title=Chapel_Brampton_(horse)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Chapel Brampton (horse) (page does not exist)") in 1930.
